title: elaphoglossum lasiolepium
intro: Elaphoglossum lasiolepium, also known as the Elaphoglossum fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum lasiolepium include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
